_comment: Bubblewrap config for the Debate AI Trusted Web Activity. To rebuild the APK/AAB after editing this file, run `npx @bubblewrap/cli update` from this directory, then `npx @bubblewrap/cli build`. The first-time setup is `npx @bubblewrap/cli init --manifest=https://debateai.com/manifest.json` — that will (re)generate this file and overwrite hand-edits, so keep this checked-in copy as the source of truth and pass --skipExisting on subsequent inits.
name: Debate AI

fingerprints._comment: Replace this placeholder with the SHA256 fingerprint of the upload key produced by `keytool -list -v -keystore android.keystore`. The same fingerprint must appear in app/.well-known/assetlinks.json so Chrome can verify the digital-asset link and hide the URL bar.
fingerprints.name: upload
